title: arrhenatherum elatius var. album
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius var. album, also known as White False Oat-grass, is a flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are beneficial for soothing digestive issues and reducing menstrual cramps. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antacid. The herbal preparations of White False Oat-grass include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications for therapeutic purposes.
